name: @monoclejs/desktop
description: MONOCLE desktop app: the Vue UI, Electron shell, and inference sidecar supervisor.

scripts.package: npm run fetch:models && electron-vite build && electron-builder
scripts.package:bundled: npm run bundle:python && npm run fetch:models && electron-vite build && electron-builder
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:node && npm run typecheck:web

// dependencies: electron-vite bundles every runtime import into out/ (the renderer is a web bundle; the main process inlines the workspace libs). The packaged app needs only electron plus node built-ins at runtime, so these stay in devDependencies. Listing them under dependencies makes electron-builder try to pack their pnpm-workspace symlinks, which resolve outside apps/desktop and fail with 'must be under apps/desktop'.
